"D:\Apps\CLion 2022.2.3\bin\cmake\win\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\lesson5.pro.dir/objects.a
"D:\Apps\CLion 2022.2.3\bin\mingw\bin\ar.exe" qc CMakeFiles\lesson5.pro.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\lesson5.pro.dir\objects1.rsp
"D:\Apps\CLion 2022.2.3\bin\mingw\bin\gcc.exe" -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\lesson5.pro.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o lesson5.pro.exe -Wl,--out-implib,liblesson5.pro.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\lesson5.pro.dir\linklibs.rsp
